g.text: Countdown-Lite acceptance eval (30 tasks x 32 samples) and unseen 2-number transfer, same protocol, max_new_tokens=12

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; fill: rgb(107, 114, 128); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: Conclusion: GRPO lifts valid expressions from 5.83% to 99.38% in-distribution and preserves the gain on unseen 2-number tasks (10.00% -> 98.75%).
Exact solves rise too: 0.73% -> 16.35% in-distribution, 3.12% -> 38.75% on unseen 2-number tasks.
